name: Super Value Titanium Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Telephone & mobile bills (min transaction ₹750 via BillPay)
Other utility bills (min transaction ₹750 via BillPay)

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
Utility/Telecom transactions below ₹750 or made outside SC BillPay
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of ₹90,000 or more in the previous year

selfEmployed: Minimum annual income equivalent to ₹55,000/month or subject to bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
5% cashback on fuel transactions up to ₹2,000 (monthly cashback cap of ₹200). Fuel surcharge waiver is not applicable.
5% cashback on telephone bills via BillPay (minimum transaction of ₹750, monthly cap of ₹200).
5% cashback on utility bills via BillPay (minimum transaction of ₹750, monthly cap of ₹100).
Other retail spends earn 1 reward point per ₹150 spent. 1 point = ₹0.25 (effectively 0.17% return value).
